---
format:
  html:
    footnotes-hover: false
    css: styles.css
mainfont: "GT-America"
linkcolor: "#00355a"
anchor-sections: false
params:
  state: "GA"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

<head>
<img src='https://csg-state-violent-crime.netlify.app/img/csgjc-logo.png' style='display: none;'> 
</head>

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
library(csgjcr)
library(highcharter)
library(htmlwidgets)
library(reactable)

source("R/utils.R")

# set path to data folder on sharepoint
sp_data_to_plot_path <- csg_sp_path("ad_hoc_requests/state_violent_crime_marshall/data")

state <- csg_state_convert(params$state, from = "abbr", "name")
state_name_text <- if_else(params$state == "DC", "the District of Columbia", state)

# read in crime data
srs_state <- read_rds(file.path(sp_data_to_plot_path, "srs_state.rds")) |> 
  filter(state_name == state, crime_cat == "Violent", year >= 2012)
srs_by_cat_state <- read_rds(file.path(sp_data_to_plot_path, "srs_by_cat_state.rds")) |> 
  filter(state_name == state, crime_cat == "Violent", year >= 2012)
srs_us <- read_rds(file.path(sp_data_to_plot_path, "srs_us.rds")) |> 
  filter(crime_cat == "Violent", year >= 2012)
srs_by_cat_us <- read_rds(file.path(sp_data_to_plot_path, "srs_by_cat_us.rds")) |> 
  filter(crime_cat == "Violent", year >= 2012)

srs_unsolved_by_county_to_map <- read_rds(file.path(sp_data_to_plot_path, 
                                             "viol_crime_unsolved_by_county_to_map.rds")) |>  
  filter(state_name == state) 
  
srs_unsolved_by_agency_to_table <- read_rds(file.path(sp_data_to_plot_path, 
                                             "viol_crime_unsolved_by_agency_to_table.rds")) |>  
  filter(state_name == state)

### create object with states to exclude
states_to_exclude_from_unsolved_rate_viz <- c("Illinois",
                                              "New York")

# create title of page
# we don't have IL or NY clearance rate data so take that out of title
doc_title <- case_when(
  state %in% states_to_exclude_from_unsolved_rate_viz ~ paste(state, "data on violent crime"),
  state == "District of Columbia" ~ paste(state, "data on violent crime and arrests"),
  TRUE ~ paste(state, "data on violent crime and arrests"),
  )

```

---
title: "`r doc_title`"
---

```{r}
min_max_viol_crime <- srs_by_cat_state |> 
  filter(year %in% range(year)) |> 
  arrange(year)

max_year <- min_max_viol_crime$year[2]
min_year <- min_max_viol_crime$year[1] 

pct_change_unsolved <- min_max_viol_crime$pct_unsolved[2] - min_max_viol_crime$pct_unsolved[1]

change_text_clear <- case_when(
  pct_change_unsolved > 0.005 &
    pct_change_unsolved < 0.015 ~ paste0(comma(abs(pct_change_unsolved * 100), 1),
                                    " percentage point worse than"),
  pct_change_unsolved >= 0.015  ~ paste0(comma(abs(pct_change_unsolved * 100), 1),
                                    " percentage points worse than"),
  pct_change_unsolved < -0.005 &
    pct_change_unsolved > -0.015 ~ paste0(comma(abs(pct_change_unsolved * 100), 1),
                                    " percentage point better than"),
  pct_change_unsolved <= -0.015 ~ paste0(comma(abs(pct_change_unsolved * 100), 1),
                                    " percentage points better than"),
  TRUE                      ~ "nearly the same as"
  )
```

## Violent crime in `r state_name_text`

::: {.panel-tabset}

## All violent crime

```{r}
srs_by_cat_state |> 
  bind_rows(srs_by_cat_us) |> 
  mutate(
    incidents_reported_rate_total = incidents_reported_rate_total * 1e5,
    tooltip = paste0(
      "<b>", state_name, " – ", year, "</b><br>",
      "Violent incidents per 100k: ", comma(incidents_reported_rate_total, 1), "<br>",
      "Violent incidents reported: ", comma(incidents_reported, 1)
      ),
    state_name = fct_relevel(state_name, "United States", after = Inf)
    ) |>
  hchart(
    "spline",
    hcaes(year, incidents_reported_rate_total, group = state_name),
    color = jr_pal[c(1, 7)],
    dashStyle = c("solid", "dash"),
    opacity = c(1, 0.75),
    accessibility = list(
      point = list(
        valueDescriptionFormat = "year: {point.x:.0f}, rate: {point.y:.1f}"
        )
      )    
  ) |> 
  hc_title(text = paste0("Violent crime in ", state_name_text)) |>
  hc_subtitle(text = "Crime reported to police per 100,000 residents") |> 
  hc_caption(text = "FBI Uniform Crime Reporting Program SRS state estimates") |> 
  hc_setup()
```

```{r}
to_plot <- srs_state |> 
  bind_rows(srs_us) |> 
  left_join(offense_pal, by = c("group" = "crime")) |> 
  # group_by(year) |> 
  mutate(
    tot_crime = sum(incidents_reported),
    pct = incidents_reported / tot_crime,
    incidents_reported_rate_total = incidents_reported_rate_total * 1e5
    ) |> 
  # ungroup() |> 
  mutate(
    group = fct_reorder(group, incidents_reported_rate_total),
    tooltip = paste0(
      "<b>", group, " – ", year, "</b></br>",
      "Incidents reported per 100k: ", comma(incidents_reported_rate_total, 1), "<br>",
      "Incidents reported: ", comma(incidents_reported, 1), "<br>",
      "Total violent incidents reported: ", comma(tot_crime, 1), "<br>",
      "Share of all violent incidents: ", percent(pct, 1)
      )
    ) |> 
  arrange(year, group)
```

## Homicide

```{r}
to_plot_2 <- to_plot |> 
  filter(group == "Homicide")

to_plot_2 |> 
  hchart(
    "spline",
    hcaes(year, incidents_reported_rate_total, group = state_name),
    color = c(unique(to_plot_2$color), jr_pal[7]),
    dashStyle = c("solid", "dash"),
    opacity = c(1, 0.75),
    accessibility = list(
      point = list(
        valueDescriptionFormat = "year: {point.x:.0f}, rate: {point.y:.1f}"
        )
      )      
  ) |> 
  hc_yAxis(min = 0) |> 
  hc_title(text = paste0("Homicide in ", state_name_text)) |>
  hc_subtitle(text = "Homicide incidents reported to police per 100,000 residents") |> 
  hc_caption(text = "FBI Uniform Crime Reporting Program SRS state estimates") |>
  hc_setup()
```

## Aggravated assault

```{r}
to_plot_3 <- to_plot |> 
  filter(group == "Aggravated assault")

to_plot_3 |> 
  hchart(
    "spline",
    hcaes(year, incidents_reported_rate_total, group = state_name),
    color = c(unique(to_plot_3$color), jr_pal[7]),
    dashStyle = c("solid", "dash"),
    opacity = c(1, 0.75),
    accessibility = list(
      point = list(
        valueDescriptionFormat = "year: {point.x:.0f}, rate: {point.y:.1f}"
        )
      )      
  ) |> 
  hc_title(text = paste0("Aggravated assault in ", state_name_text)) |>
  hc_subtitle(text = "Incidents reported to police per 100,000 residents where aggravated assault was the most serious offense") |>
  hc_caption(text = "FBI Uniform Crime Reporting Program SRS state estimates") |> 
  hc_setup()
```

## Robbery

```{r}
to_plot_4 <- to_plot |> 
  filter(group == "Robbery")

to_plot_4 |>
  hchart(
    "spline",
    hcaes(year, incidents_reported_rate_total, group = state_name),
    color = c(unique(to_plot_4$color), jr_pal[7]),
    dashStyle = c("solid", "dash"),
    opacity = c(1, 0.75),
    accessibility = list(
      point = list(
        valueDescriptionFormat = "year: {point.x:.0f}, rate: {point.y:.1f}"
        )
      )      
  ) |> 
  hc_title(text = paste0("Robbery in ", state_name_text)) |>
  hc_subtitle(text = "Incidents reported to police per 100,000 residents where robbery was the most serious offense") |>
  hc_caption(text = "FBI Uniform Crime Reporting Program SRS state estimates") |> 
  hc_setup()
```

## Rape

```{r}
to_plot_5 <- to_plot |> 
  filter(group == "Rape")

to_plot_5 |> 
  hchart(
    "spline",
    hcaes(year, incidents_reported_rate_total, group = state_name),
    color = c(unique(to_plot_5$color), jr_pal[7]),
    dashStyle = c("solid", "dash"),
    opacity = c(1, 0.75),    
    accessibility = list(
      point = list(
        valueDescriptionFormat = "year: {point.x:.0f}, rate: {point.y:.1f}"
        )
      )      
  ) |> 
  hc_title(text = paste0("Rape in ", state_name_text)) |>
  hc_subtitle(text = "Incidents reported to police per 100,000 residents where rape was the most serious offense") |>
  hc_caption(text = "FBI Uniform Crime Reporting Program SRS state estimates<br>The FBI <a href='https://ucr.fbi.gov/recent-program-updates/new-rape-definition-frequently-asked-questions' target='_parent'>broadened the definition of rape<a/> for crime reporting in 2013") |> 
  hc_setup()
```

## By offense

```{r}
to_plot |>
  filter(state_name == state) |> 
  hchart(
    "column",
    stacking = "normal",
    groupPadding = 0.05,
    hcaes(year, incidents_reported_rate_total, group = group),
    accessibility = list(
      point = list(
        valueDescriptionFormat = "year: {point.x:.0f}, rate: {point.y:.1f}"
        )
      )      
  ) |> 
  hc_colors(unique(to_plot$color)) |> 
  hc_title(text = paste0("Violent crime in ", state_name_text, ", by offense")) |>
  hc_subtitle(text = "Crime reported to police per 100,000 residents") |> 
  hc_caption(text = "FBI Uniform Crime Reporting Program SRS state estimates") |> 
  hc_setup()
```

:::

::: {.callout-note icon=false collapse=true}

## Background on crime data reporting

Beginning with data year 2021, the FBI discontinued collecting Uniform Crime Reporting data via the Summary Reporting System and required law enforcement agencies to use the [National Incident-Based Reporting System (NIBRS)](https://bjs.ojp.gov/national-incident-based-reporting-system-nibrs){target="_parent"} to report crime statistics to the FBI. Because many states did not have full NIBRS reporting coverage in 2021, the FBI and Bureau of Justice Statistics [generated estimated crime statistics](https://bjs.ojp.gov/library/publications/estimation-procedures-crimes-united-states-based-nibrs-data){target="_parent"} based on the agencies that reported data to the FBI. The reported crime and clearance rates for 2021 have a level of uncertainty represented by a margin of error for each estimate because not all agencies reported data to the FBI.

:::

```{r, eval=!state %in% states_to_exclude_from_unsolved_rate_viz, results='asis'}
cat("## Unsolved violent crime in", state_name_text)
```

```{r, eval=!state %in% states_to_exclude_from_unsolved_rate_viz}
unsolved_rate_max <- paste0(comma(min_max_viol_crime$pct_unsolved[2] * 100, 1), " percent")
```

```{r, eval=!state %in% states_to_exclude_from_unsolved_rate_viz, results='asis'}
cat(paste0(
  "In ", max_year, ", ", unsolved_rate_max, " of violent crimes reported to police were not solved. This is ", change_text_clear, " the unsolved rate in ", min_year, "."
))
```

```{r, eval=!state %in% states_to_exclude_from_unsolved_rate_viz, results='asis'}
cat("
::: {.panel-tabset}

## All violent crime
")
```

```{r, eval=!state %in% states_to_exclude_from_unsolved_rate_viz}
srs_by_cat_state |> 
  bind_rows(srs_by_cat_us) |> 
  mutate(
    pct_unsolved = pct_unsolved * 100,
    tooltip = paste0(
      "<b>", state_name, " – ", year, "</b><br>",
      "Unsolved rate: ", percent(pct_unsolved / 100, 1), "<br>",
      "Violent incidents reported: ", comma(incidents_reported, 1), "<br>",
      "Violent incidents unsolved: ", comma(incidents_unsolved, 1)
      ),
    state_name = fct_relevel(state_name, "United States", after = Inf)
    ) |> 
  hchart(
    "spline",
    hcaes(year, pct_unsolved, group = state_name),
    color = jr_pal[c(1, 7)],
    dashStyle = c("solid", "dash"),
    opacity = c(1, 0.75),
    accessibility = list(
      point = list(
        valueDescriptionFormat = "year: {point.x:.0f}, unsolved rate: {point.y:.1f}%"
        )
      )     
  ) |> 
  hc_title(text = paste("Violent crime unsolved rate in ", state_name_text)) |>
  hc_caption(text = "FBI Uniform Crime Reporting Program<br>Aggregated from SRS agency-level Offenses Known reports") |> 
  hc_setup() |> 
  hc_yAxis(labels = list(format = "{value:,.0f}%"))
```

```{r, eval=!state %in% states_to_exclude_from_unsolved_rate_viz, results='asis'}
cat("
## By offense
")
```

```{r, eval=!state %in% states_to_exclude_from_unsolved_rate_viz}
to_plot <- srs_state |> 
  left_join(offense_pal, by = c("group" = "crime")) |> 
  mutate(
    pct_unsolved = pct_unsolved * 100,
    group = fct_reorder(group, pct_unsolved, last),
    tooltip = paste0(
      "<b>", group, " – ", year, "</b></br>",
      "Unsolved rate: ", percent(pct_unsolved / 100, 1), "<br>",
      "Incidents reported: ", comma(incidents_reported, 1), "<br>",
      "Incidents unsolved: ", comma(incidents_unsolved, 1)
      )
    ) |> 
  arrange(desc(year), pct_unsolved)

to_plot |>   
  hchart(
    "spline",
    hcaes(year, pct_unsolved, group = group),
    accessibility = list(
      point = list(
        valueDescriptionFormat = "{point.state}, year: {point.x:.0f}, unsolved rate: {point.y:.1f}%"
        )
      )       
  ) |> 
  hc_colors(unique(to_plot$color)) |> 
  hc_title(text = paste0("Violent crime clearance rate in ", state_name_text, ", by offense")) |>
  hc_caption(text = "FBI Uniform Crime Reporting Program<br>Aggregated from SRS agency-level Offenses Known reports") |> 
  hc_setup() |> 
  hc_yAxis(labels = list(format = "{value:,.0f}%"))
```

```{r, eval=!state %in% states_to_exclude_from_unsolved_rate_viz, results='asis'}
cat("
:::
")
```

```{r, eval=!state %in% states_to_exclude_from_unsolved_rate_viz, results='asis'}
cat("## Mapping unsolved violent crime by county in", state_name_text)
```

```{r, eval=!state %in% states_to_exclude_from_unsolved_rate_viz}
total_agencies <- comma(n_distinct(srs_unsolved_by_agency_to_table$agency_name))

counties_represented <- comma(n_distinct(srs_unsolved_by_agency_to_table$county_with_nyc))
```

```{r, eval=!state %in% states_to_exclude_from_unsolved_rate_viz, results='asis'}
cat(paste0(
  "In the map below, ", total_agencies, " law enforcement agencies and ", counties_represented, " counties are represented."))
```


```{r, eval=!state %in% states_to_exclude_from_unsolved_rate_viz}
### choose blues from csgjcr for now
blue1 <- "#d4e9f8"
blue2 <- "#9ed4ef"
blue4 <- "#007392"
blue5 <- "#00475d"

### add tooltip
srs_unsolved_by_county_to_map_tooltip <- srs_unsolved_by_county_to_map |> 
  ### add '+" in front of positive numbers and 0
  ### only for value we'll include in tooltip
  mutate(unsolved_rate_percent_change_2019_2022_clean = as.numeric(comma(unsolved_rate_percent_change_2019_2022,1)),
         unsolved_rate_percent_change_2019_2022_clean = sprintf("%+3d%%", unsolved_rate_percent_change_2019_2022_clean),
         tooltip = paste0(
    "<b>", state_name,"</b><br>",
      "Agencies reporting data (2022): ", comma(n_agencies, 1), "<br>",
      "Incidents reported (2022): ", comma(n_reported_2022, 1), "<br>",
      "Incidents unsolved (2022): ", comma(n_unsolved_2022, 1), "<br>",
      "Unsolved rate (2019): ", comma(unsolved_rate_2019, 1),"%", "<br>",
      "Unsolved rate (2022): ", comma(unsolved_rate_2022, 1),"%", "<br>",
      "Change in unsolved rate (2019 to 2022): ", unsolved_rate_percent_change_2019_2022_clean))

### pull only state geo that we want for each param iteration
### to do: add legend title, additional info in tooltip, accessibility? 
hcmap(
  paste0("countries/us/us-",tolower(head(srs_unsolved_by_county_to_map_tooltip$state_abbr,1)),"-all"),
  data = srs_unsolved_by_county_to_map_tooltip,
  value = "unsolved_rate_2022",
  joinBy = c("fips","county_fips"),
  nullColor = "#E8E8E8",
  borderWidth = 0.1) |> 
  hc_colorAxis(endOnTick = TRUE,
               startOnTick = TRUE,
               stops = color_stops(4, c(blue1,
                                        blue2,
                                        blue4,
                                        blue5)),
               labels = list(format = "{value}%",
                             style = list(fontSize = "12px"))) |> 
  hc_legend(align = "center",
            horizontalAlign = "bottom",
            layout = "horizontal",
            # title = list(text = "Percent Change"),
            symbolHeight = 25,
            symbolWidth = 225,
            x = 0,
            y = 0,
            itemStyle = list(fontSize = "14px",
                       fontFamily = "GT America",
                       fontWeight = 400)) |> 
     hc_tooltip(
        formatter = JS("function() {
        return '<div style=\"background-color: #FFFFFF; opacity: 1; padding: 8px; border: none;\">' +
        this.point.tooltip +
        '</div>';}"),
        useHTML = TRUE
      )  |>
    hc_plotOptions(
      series = list(
        animation = FALSE,
        cursor = "pointer",
        accessibility = list(
          enabled = TRUE,
          keyboardNavigation = list(enabled = TRUE)
        ),
        point = list(
          events = list(
            click = JS("function(){parent.document.location.href = this.options.url}"))
        )
      )
    ) |>
    hc_add_dependency(name = "modules/accessibility.js")


```

```{r, eval=!state %in% states_to_exclude_from_unsolved_rate_viz, results='asis'}
cat("## Unsolved violent crime by agency in", state_name_text)
```


```{r, eval=!state %in% states_to_exclude_from_unsolved_rate_viz}
srs_unsolved_by_agency_to_table |> 
  ### remove state name
  ### we just needed it to filter on param
  select(-state_name) |> 
  arrange(desc(population)) |>
  reactable_template(
    sort_col = list("population" = "desc"),
    columns = list(
      agency_name = colDef(name = "Agency", minWidth = 250),
      agency_type = colDef(name = "Agency Type"),
      county_with_nyc = colDef(name = "County"),
      population = colDef(name = "Population", minWidth = 115), 
      n_reported = colDef(name = "Count of Violent Index Crimes"), 
      n_reported_rate = colDef(name = "Violent Index Crime Rate (per 100k)"), 
      unsolved_rate_rounded = colDef(name = "Unsolved Violent Index Crime Rate (%)"), 
      style = list(
        fontFamily = "Source Sans Pro",
        fontWeight = 600)))

```

::: {.callout-note icon=false collapse=true}

## Data sources

#### Crime and clearance rates

Data regarding crime and clearance rates come from the FBI's [Uniform Crime Reporting Program](https://www.fbi.gov/how-we-can-help-you/need-an-fbi-service-or-more-information/ucr){target="_parent"}. State-level counts of reported violent crime incidents between 2010 and 2020 are derived from the Summary Reporting System (SRS) in which law enforcement agencies submitted monthly counts of the four violent Part 1 Index Crimes (murder, aggravated assault, rape, and robbery). The FBI generated state-level estimates for reported crime from 1979 to 2020 based on agency-level reports, and these estimates are used on this page for counts of crime. These estimates can be downloaded from the [FBI's Crime Data Explorer](https://cde.ucr.cjis.gov/LATEST/webapp/#/pages/downloads){target="_parent"}.

State-level crime rates are calculated by dividing the number of estimated incidents by the total state population. Population data come from the U.S. Census Bureau [American Community Survey 1-year estimates (table B01003)](https://www.census.gov/programs-surveys/acs/data.html){target="_parent"} and the [2020 Decennial Census Redistricting Data (table P1)](https://www.census.gov/programs-surveys/decennial-census/about/rdo/summary-files.html){target="_parent"}.

State-level clearance rates are estimated by aggregating agency-level data from the SRS Offenses Known and Clearances by Arrest (Return A) dataset. The clearance rates reported here are the number of incidents cleared by arrest plus the number of incidents exceptionally cleared divided by the total number of incidents known.

National rates of crime and clearances come from the FBI's annual report, [_Crime in the U.S._](https://ucr.fbi.gov/crime-in-the-u.s/2019/crime-in-the-u.s.-2019){target="_parent"}

State-level crime and clearance data for 2021 come from the FBI's National Incident-Based Reporting System [state estimation program](https://bjs.ojp.gov/library/publications/estimation-procedures-crimes-united-states-based-nibrs-data){target="_parent"}. Crime data for 2021 are included in these pages for states in which law enforcement agencies covering at least 90 percent of the population reported NIBRS data.

:::
